title: Elevate24 recap
excerpt: Hey! Is there a way to rewatch all the upcoming features in 2025? I would like to present this in the company and get them as excited as me :slight_smile:

posts.author: Kim1988 (Kim van der Wijk #monday ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey! Is there a way to rewatch all the upcoming features in 2025? I would like to present this in the company and get them as excited as me

posts.author: MCautreels (Maarten Cautreels - Tryve)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Kim,

The sessions from Elevate London, NYC or Sydney won’t be available online. Although some sessions might be made available after Elevate Online which takes place on December 4th:

image965×189 8.24 KB

From the Elevate 2024 FAQ

So we’ll need a few more months of patience unfortunately.

Best,

Maarten
